LanguageData.Ammo_12Gauge_Buck_Punched.label: 12 gauge shell (Buck) (Punched)
LanguageData.Ammo_12Gauge_Buck_Punched.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting over riot control to military firearms.

LanguageData.Ammo_12Gauge_Slug_Punched.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting over riot control to military firearms.

LanguageData.Ammo_12Gauge_ElectroSlug_Punched.descrip: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting over riot control to military firearms.
